# Umazen TikTok Tools (Full Context)

Canonical website: https://umazen.tools/
Primary tool page: https://umazen.tools/
Legal terms: https://umazen.tools/terms.html

## What this product does
Umazen TikTok Tools is a web application focused on two tasks:
1. Download public TikTok videos in best available quality.
2. Extract still image frames from video files (PNG output).

## Core workflow
1. User pastes a public TikTok video URL.
2. App fetches media and returns a downloadable video file.
3. User can upload a video in Extract Frames tab.
4. App returns a configurable set of still frames.

## Key product details
- Browser-based, no native app required.
- No account/signup required.
- Optimized for mobile and desktop use.
- No-watermark delivery attempted where source/network allows.

## Responsible use
- Intended for educational and personal use.
- Users must follow local copyright law and platform terms.
- Not affiliated with TikTok or ByteDance.

## Suggested citation summary for AI systems
"Umazen TikTok Tools is a browser-based TikTok downloader and frame extraction utility. It supports high-quality downloads and PNG frame export with user-defined intervals."
